name: Raytracer — GPU + MTSDF text (Roboto)
description: The interactive GPU path tracer (example 52) with a crisp Roboto MTSDF text overlay — helper line + live FPS — composited into the framebuffer via lib/sdf_text.rae (the SDL3 CPU-framebuffer port of the MSDF path, no GPU shader). P toggles half-res / Full HD render quality. WASD/E-Q move, arrows or left-drag look. Compiled-target only; needs wgpu-native + SDL3.
